Our team
"Dentistry is not just technique — it is listening, trust, and artistry together."
Dr. Chirkova
14
Years of practice
Dr. Chirkova
DMD · Cosmetic & Restorative Dentistry

I started Chirkova Dentist with one belief: that patients deserve a space where they feel genuinely seen — not rushed through a procedure. Every smile has a unique story.
How it works

Your path to a perfect smile

01

Consultation

A relaxed conversation about your goals and concerns.

02

Diagnosis

Full digital imaging and a personalised treatment roadmap.

03

Treatment

Expert care using the finest materials, at your pace.

04

Aftercare

Follow-ups, advice, and a direct line for questions.

Transparent pricing

Clear prices, no surprises

All prices include materials. Treatment plans are discussed individually before any work begins.

Consultation
Initial consultationFree
Repeat consultation200 ₴
Cosmetic
Porcelain veneer (1)from 8 000 ₴
Composite bonding (1)from 2 500 ₴
Zoom whitening4 500 ₴
Implants
Implant (all-in)from 25 000 ₴
Crown (ceramic)from 5 500 ₴
Orthodontics
Aligners (full course)from 45 000 ₴
Metal bracesfrom 18 000 ₴
Preventive
Cleaning + polish1 500 ₴
Digital X-ray (full)800 ₴

Prices effective 2025. Payment: cash, card, Apple Pay, installment plans available.
